_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: PostgreSQL
author: aetherix@lunexia.com
description:
PostgreSQL database server egg.

PostgreSQL 18 is the latest release (May 2026). PostgreSQL 17 remains supported.

Default port: 5432.
Data is stored in /home/container/data.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# PostgreSQL Installation Script
# by Aetherix-ops
#
apt update && apt install -y postgresql postgresql-contrib

mkdir -p /mnt/server/data
chown postgres:postgres /mnt/server/data

su postgres -c "initdb -D /mnt/server/data"

echo "host all all 0.0.0.0/0 md5" >> /mnt/server/data/pg_hba.conf
echo "listen_addresses = '*'" >> /mnt/server/data/postgresql.conf
echo "port = 5432" >> /mnt/server/data/postgresql.conf

echo "install complete"

variables.name: Default Database
variables.description: Name of the default database to create.
